narrative:
06 Ohio House district has 68,150 registered voters, with 66.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 13.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.4%, a modest Democratic lean of 5.6 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +4.6% D−R vs +1.3% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
